response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional experience, including recent full-stack work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience — a required skill that is rare among applicants. Strong testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses) and cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) align well with the role. Gaps are mostly around specific framework overlap (no Nest.js or Kotlin evidence) rather than fundamentals.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience at product companies, well beyond the 6-year bar
Current AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) matching a hard requirement
Exceptional testing and craftsmanship background: TDD practitioner, test-framework author, workshop instructor
concerns: No demonstrated Nest.js experience, a core framework in the primary stack
Kotlin absent and Java exposure appears dated, limiting coverage of secondary backend services
Significant career time in niche technologies (DLang, Ember.js) that don't transfer directly to the listed stack
